sources.title: Lex Fridman Podcast #452
sources.description: 5+ hour deep-dive covering scaling laws, AI safety, mechanistic interpretability (with Chris Olah), Claude's character (with Amanda Askell), leaving OpenAI, alignment research, and the future of AI and humanity.

sources.title: Dwarkesh Podcast — $10 Billion Models, OpenAI, Scaling, & AGI
sources.description: Deep technical dive on scaling hypothesis, $10B training runs, race dynamics with OpenAI and China, bioterrorism risk from AI, cybersecurity, alignment techniques, and mechanistic interpretability research.

sources.title: Dwarkesh Podcast — We are near the end of the exponential
sources.description: Discusses scaling hypothesis in the RL regime, whether Anthropic is underinvesting in compute, how AI will diffuse throughout the economy, frontier lab profitability, and the concept of a country of geniuses in a datacenter.

sources.title: A Cheeky Pint with Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei (Stripe)
sources.description: John Collison interviews Dario on Anthropic's growth to ~$5B ARR, B2B focus, AI talent wars, open-source models, safety regulations, model economics, and building AGI-pilled products.

sources.title: People by WTF — The AI Tsunami is Here & Society Isn't Ready (Nikhil Kamath)
sources.description: Covers AI's impact on biotech, consciousness questions, India's AI future, why Anthropic withheld a model before ChatGPT, and whether outsourcing thinking to AI makes humans less capable.

sources.title: Logan Bartlett Show EP 82 — Dario Amodei's AI Predictions Through 2030
sources.description: Detailed predictions on AI industry for 2024-2030. Discusses leaving OpenAI, starting Anthropic, why he dislikes the term AGI, and what AI developments excite him most.
